title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.410 - Evaluation of contracts
text:
630.410.  Evaluation of contracts. — The department shall evaluate any proposed contract to determine whether it meets the following criteria:
  (1)  Conformance with the conditions and priorities of the regional and state division plans;
  (2)  Compliance with department rules and regulations.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
